title: xript Install Descriptor
description: Host-side wire shape identifying an installable mod: source, identity, integrity, and declared capabilities. integrity and signature are host-verified strings; xript defines the fields and never checks them.

location.description: The path, URL, or registry coordinate for the source.

integrity.description: Sub-resource-integrity-style hash (e.g. sha256-...). Host-verified; xript never checks it.

signature.description: Detached signature. Host-verified; xript never checks it.

capabilities.description: Capabilities the mod declares it requires.

manifest.description: Inline mod manifest, or omitted when fetched lazily.
